question: How do I post a job on the portal?
answer: Simply sign up as an employer, navigate to the 'Post a Job' page, fill in the job details such as title, description, requirements, and salary range, then publish your listing. It will be visible to thousands of job seekers instantly.

question: Is it free to apply for jobs?
answer: Yes! Applying for jobs on our platform is completely free for all job seekers. You can browse, search, and apply to as many positions as you like without any charges.

question: How can I track my job applications?
answer: Once you apply for a job, you can track the status of all your applications from the 'My Jobs' dashboard. You'll receive real-time updates when employers view your application or change its status.

question: What makes this portal different from others?
answer: Our platform offers a seamless experience with AI-powered job matching, real-time application tracking, and a curated list of verified employers. We prioritize quality over quantity to help you find the perfect fit faster.

question: Can I filter jobs by location or salary?
answer: Absolutely! Our advanced search filters let you narrow down jobs by location, salary range, experience level, company, and job type (full-time, part-time, remote, etc.) to find exactly what you're looking for.
